新手注意：

Pixel機主要分：flagship 同 mid range, 個名主要用a黎分
flagship: pixel 3, pixel 4
mid range: pixel 3a, pixel 4a

Function, Spec
flagship: 以pixel 4為例，雙鏡，flagship soc，ip rating(姐係防水防塵），玻璃背，wireless charge
mid range: 會比flagship差啲野，主要係單鏡，mid range soc，冇ip rating，膠背，no wireless charge

買：
香港仲係冇行貨，所以你主要買嘅方法只有上網或者等水貨佬入香港

上網：美馬，b&h
香港水貨：先達嗰類啦

上網買要睇ship唔ship香港，google store就好多時都唔得，集運都ban

Pixel版本：
主要分unlocked同carrier，香港一定係用unlocked，carrier係要用指定電訊商嘅電話卡

Google pay/root嘅問題：
google pay喺冇root機嘅情況下係冇問題
有咩情況要root: 想用一啲limited function，姐係pixel 4 motion sense喺香港唔用得，想break呢個limitation就要root機，但root左之後google pay好有機會用唔到，仲有銀行app都用唔到

保養：
話明水貨就當然香港冇得保，除非你自己寄返去美國

購買指南：
同平時上網買野一樣，揀完入地址比錢，跟返上面嘅information去買，最最最正路喺美馬b&h買嘅，佢會寫送唔送香港，直送就落得單，揀返unlocked版就得

請注意：
唔好用 VPN 係amazon 買嘢，有巴打俾amazon連lock兩次account

你地會唔會裝accubattery
check住舊電，叉到100%就響即蚊，保護舊電
可否自行設定叉到指定某個位就提示抆線

有得set到幾多%就響

Android 11 Usability Enhancements
Screen recorder
Screen recording is now built in, so you don’t need an extra app. Record with sound from your mic, your device or both.

App suggestions
Pixel devices1 now make app suggestions based on your daily routines. These apps show up on the bottom row of your home screen. So you can get the apps you need when you need them.

Smart folders
See intelligent suggestions for folder names on your Pixel device1. For a home screen that stays organized.

Call screening
New APIs to help screening apps better identify spam calls.

Schedule Dark mode
Schedule when you want your phone to turn to Dark mode. And when you want it to go back to a standard display.

Picture-in-picture
Picture-in-picture windows can be adjusted to fit the size you need.

5G detection API
With new APIs, apps know if you’re on a 5G connection. So you get better performance.

Hingle angle sensor support
So apps can better support all kinds of foldable configurations.

Ethernet tethering
Share a tethered internet connection with a USB ethernet dongle.

Gesture sensitivity
When using gesture nav, you can now fine-tune both Back gestures on the left and right edge independently of one another.

Notification history
Your notification history is now available in settings.

Sharesheet
Pin the apps you use most in the Sharesheet.

Android 11 Usability Enhancements
Screen recorder
Screen recording is now built in, so you don’t need an extra app. Record with sound from your mic, your device or both.

App suggestions
Pixel devices1 now make app suggestions based on your daily routines. These apps show up on the bottom row of your home screen. So you can get the apps you need when you need them.

Smart folders
See intelligent suggestions for folder names on your Pixel device1. For a home screen that stays organized.

Call screening
New APIs to help screening apps better identify spam calls.

Schedule Dark mode
Schedule when you want your phone to turn to Dark mode. And when you want it to go back to a standard display.

Picture-in-picture
Picture-in-picture windows can be adjusted to fit the size you need.

5G detection API
With new APIs, apps know if you’re on a 5G connection. So you get better performance.

Hingle angle sensor support
So apps can better support all kinds of foldable configurations.

Ethernet tethering
Share a tethered internet connection with a USB ethernet dongle.

Gesture sensitivity
When using gesture nav, you can now fine-tune both Back gestures on the left and right edge independently of one another.

Notification history
Your notification history is now available in settings.

Sharesheet
Pin the apps you use most in the Sharesheet.

replies.msg:
Android 11 更新功能升級

屏幕錄像機
屏幕錄音現已內置，因此您不需要額外的應用程序，即可使用麥克風，設備或兩者的聲音進行錄音。

應用建議
現在，Pixel devices1可根據您的日常工作提出應用建議。 這些應用程序顯示在主屏幕的底行。 因此，您可以在需要時獲得所需的應用程序。

智能文件夾
在Pixel設備上查看有關文件夾名稱的明智建議，保持井井有條的主屏幕。

通話篩選
新的API可幫助篩選應用程序，從而更好地識別垃圾郵件。

排程黑暗模式
排程何時要將手機設置為暗模式。 而當您希望它返回標準顯示時。

畫中畫
可以調整畫中畫窗口以適合您所需的大小。

5G檢測API
使用新的API，應用程序可以知道您是否處於5G連接中。 這樣您可以獲得更好的性能。

鉸鏈角度傳感器支持
因此，應用程序可以更好地支持各種可折疊配置。
Hingle angle sensor support
So apps can better support all kinds of foldable configurations.


以太網網絡共享
與USB以太網加密狗共享共享的互聯網連接。

手勢靈敏度
使用手勢導航時，您現在可以彼此獨立地微調左右邊緣上的後向手勢。

通知記錄
您的通知歷史記錄現在可以在設置中使用。

共享表
將最常用的應用固定在共享表中。

新手注意：

Pixel機主要分：flagship 同 mid range, 個名主要用a黎分
flagship: pixel 3, pixel 4
mid range: pixel 3a, pixel 4a

Function, Spec
flagship: 以pixel 4為例，雙鏡，flagship soc，ip rating(姐係防水防塵），玻璃背，wireless charge
mid range: 會比flagship差啲野，主要係單鏡，mid range soc，冇ip rating，膠背，no wireless charge

買：
香港仲係冇行貨，所以你主要買嘅方法只有上網或者等水貨佬入香港

上網：美馬，b&h
香港水貨：先達嗰類啦

上網買要睇ship唔ship香港，google store就好多時都唔得，集運都ban

Pixel版本：
主要分unlocked同carrier，香港一定係用unlocked，carrier係要用指定電訊商嘅電話卡

Google pay/root嘅問題：
google pay喺冇root機嘅情況下係冇問題
有咩情況要root: 想用一啲limited function，姐係pixel 4 motion sense喺香港唔用得，想break呢個limitation就要root機，但root左之後google pay好有機會用唔到，仲有銀行app都用唔到

保養：
話明水貨就當然香港冇得保，除非你自己寄返去美國

購買指南：
同平時上網買野一樣，揀完入地址比錢，跟返上面嘅information去買，最最最正路喺美馬b&h買嘅，佢會寫送唔送香港，直送就落得單，揀返unlocked版就得

請注意：
唔好用 VPN 係amazon 買嘢，有巴打俾amazon連lock兩次account
